## Summary

Describe the user-facing or maintainer-facing change.

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run build`

## Maintainer Notes

- [ ] The change avoids leaking private URLs, credentials, or page contents.
- [ ] URL fetching behavior still blocks private/local network targets by default.
- [ ] Docs or issue templates were updated if the workflow changed.
